ReleaseNotes: Updated the release package workflow to use encrypted .etpkg update packages together with matching SHA256 verification.
Improved update manifest generation so release metadata can be produced directly from encrypted packages during publishing.
Fixed updater key propagation so downloaded encrypted packages can be decrypted and installed correctly after verification.
Updated the default update source configuration to use the GitHub repository release channel.
Improved release tooling and manifest utility behavior for package selection, manual path entry, and update package publishing.
